name: Spinach and Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces fresh spinach, washed, trimmed and towel dry
1 tablespoon whole grain mustard or 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard
6 tablespoons sunflower oil (safflower or olive oil is acceptable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the spinach leaves into small strips and place in a bowl; set aside.
2. Peel the oranges and cut away the skin and pith with a serrated knife. Cut the oranges into segments, removing membranes and discarding seeds.
3. Whisk together mustard, garlic, oil, lemon juice, sugar, and season to taste until well emulsified.
4. Halve the avocados and remove pits. Peel and cut the avocados into even-sized chunks.
5. Place the oranges, avocado chunks, and sliced mushrooms on top of the spinach.
6. Refrigerate the salad and dressing until ready to serve.
7. Pour the dressing over the salad and carefully mix together.
8. Sprinkle with croutons and serve immediately.
